programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Senior Moment
programme.desc: A retired NASA test pilot learns to navigate love and life again. Starring William Shatner and Jean Smart.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: The Loft
programme.desc: Five men share a loft for affairs; a woman’s body changes everything.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: A retiring police detective pledges to catch the killer of a young child.

programme.title: Arlington Road
programme.desc: Man begins to suspect his neighbors are not what they appear to be and their secrets could be deadly

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: A young woman's world unravels when a drug prescribed by her psychiatrist has unexpected side effects.

programme.title: Battle Los Angeles
programme.desc: For years, there have been documented cases of UFO sightings around the world – Buenos Aires, Seoul, France, Germany, China. But in 2011, what were once just sightings will become a terrifying reality when Earth is attacked by unknown forces. As people everywhere watch the world’s great cities fall, Los Angeles becomes the last stand for mankind in a battle no one expected. It’s up to a Marine staff sergeant (Aaron Eckhart) and his new platoon to draw a line in the sand as they take on an enemy unlike any they’ve ever encountered before.

programme.title: Flatliners
programme.desc: Julia Roberts, Kiefer Sutherland and Kevin Bacon star in this "edge of your seat" thriller as medical students who push themselves to the boundaries of life itself and touch the face of death. This offbeat drama is directed by Joel Schumacher.

programme.title: Priest
programme.desc: PRIEST, a post-apocalyptic sci fi thriller, is set in an alternate world -- one ravaged by centuries of war between man and vampires. The story revolves around a legendary Warrior Priest (Paul Bettany) from the last Vampire War who now lives in obscurity among the other downtrodden human inhabitants in walled-in dystopian cities ruled by the Church. When his niece (Lily Collins) is abducted by a murderous pack of vampires, Priest breaks his sacred vows to venture out on an obsessive quest to find her before they turn her into one of them. He is joined on his crusade by his niece’s boyfriend (Cam Gigandet), a trigger-fingered young wasteland sheriff, and a former Warrior Priestess (Maggie Q) who possesses otherworldly fighting skills.

programme.title: The Cave
programme.desc: A group of expert cave explorers go for a deep-sea ocean dive to explore a new cave. While on the expedition, the cave collapses, leaving the team stranded. As rescuers race to save them, the team discovers that they are being hunted by unexplained blood-thirsty creatures.

programme.title: Twentieth Century
programme.desc: Carole Lombard and John Barrymore star in this all-time classic screwball comedy based on the Charles MacArthur-Ben Hecht Broadway hit and directed by Howard Hawks. It s the story of a maniacal Broadway director (Barrymore) who transforms shopgirl Carole Lombard from a talented amateur to a smashing Great White Way success adored by public and press.

programme.title: Walk, Don't Run
programme.desc: A middle-aged electronics expert in Tokyo during the Olympics, is forced to share an apartment with a young woman since his hotel suite will not be available for two days.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: A naval lieutenant is court-martialed for seizing command of a minesweeper from a neurotic commander (Humphrey Bogart).

programme.title: His Girl Friday
programme.desc: An unscrupulous newspaper editor (Cary Grant) uses every dirty trick in the book to stop his ace reporter/ex-wife (Rosalind Russell) from remarrying and moving to Albany. Directed by Howard Hawks.

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: From Stephenie Meyer, the creator of the worldwide phenomenon The Twilight Saga, comes this daring and romantic thriller based on the bestselling novel. When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world. The Host is a passionate and powerful epic love story.

programme.title: When Love Came To Town
programme.desc: Abby, an author is used to making up quirky, charming characters, but here in Bliss they have sprung to life.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Blessed & Cursed
programme.desc: Pain, Deceit and Triumph are just some of the plots twists that viewers will experience in this highly anticipated movie! A modern retelling of the dramatic Biblical account of Saul and David, Blessed & Cursed stars Gospel sensation Deitrick Haddon in his first theatrical debut as Dwight Hawkins an incredibly gifted young man who is in search of his purpose amid setbacks and unexpected surprises!

programme.title: 10 Kilos in the Trunk
programme.desc: Tonya needs to make some quick cash for the holidays, and takes a job transporting cocaine. On the way to the drop-off, her car breaks down in the middle of nowhere. While walking to a gas station for help, she is stopped by a police officer, and arrested for several warrants. Now in jail, Tonya, gets her friend Monica to make the delivery. Monica must get the car fixed, avoid a thief looking to steal the product, and make the delivery by the deadline or both will face deadly consequences.

programme.title: South Side Hero
programme.desc: After serving a 10-year sentence on a RICO charge, reformed gangster Tommy ‘Ace’ Crown returns home to find his 15-year old daughter Sierra missing after she ran away with a man she met online. When the police decline to help, Ace is determined to track her down himself.

programme.title: Double Standards
programme.desc: A upstanding perfect couple of their community church 'First Lady Trezjiir Jonez a devoted wife, of Pastor Noble Jonez, that lives a unknown double life, decides to engage in pre-marital counseling sessions in their unstable home, where sexual desires of hidden thirsty passion enter as a fatal demise' will the sin be forgiven or will it be the ultimate judgment day

programme.title: My Plus Size Bachelorette
programme.desc: Symone, a spirited and vibrant plus-size woman in her 30s, finds herself navigating the unpredictable world of modern dating while grappling with the emotional aftermath of her one-night stand with Andre, her high school sweetheart. With her friends rallying around her, they encourage Symone to embrace her single status and embark on a journey of self-discovery and love.

programme.title: Robotapocalypse
programme.desc: An expert hacker tries to stop a powerful, sentient A.I. as it takes over the world's military.

programme.title: Ape vs. Monster
programme.desc: An ape in space crashes on Earth. Sludge from the ship triggers massive growth in the ape and a gila monster.

programme.desc: After a woman’s family is slaughtered, she hires a gunslinger to teach her how to shoot to take vengeance.

programme.title: Megalodon
programme.desc: While searching for an unidentified submersible, a military vessel crosses paths with a giant shark.

programme.title: The Ward
programme.desc: In 1966, in North Bend, Oregon, the runaway the police capture Kristen after burning down a farmhouse and is locked in the North Bend Psychiatric Hospital. Kristen is introduced to Dr. Gerald Stringer, who uses experimental therapy. Then she meets the inmates Emily, Sarah, Zoey, and Iris and the tough nurse Lundt. During the night and in the shower later, Kristen sees the ghost of a woman and she learns that she is Alice Leigh Hudson, a mysterious wicked intern that has disappeared. When Iris is ready to go home, she is attacked by the ghost of Alice in the basement and murdered. She vanishes and the inmates decide to seek Iris out. Then Sarah is abducted by Alice and killed; the next one is Emily. Meanwhile, Kristen escapes from her room and meets Zoey, expecting to protect her. However, Alice kidnaps Zoey and Kristen runs to Dr. Stringer's office. She snoops his desk and finds a report with the truth about Alice.

programme.title: The Final Wish
programme.desc: From the creator of the Final Destination franchise comes a new tale of death. Following the passing of his father, Aaron Hammond (MICHAEL WELCH) returns to his hometown to help his devastated mother (LIN SHAYE) and to confront his past demons. Sifting through his fathers belongings, Aaron comes upon a mysterious item that is far more than it seems.

programme.title: It Hatched
programme.desc: A couple moves from Nashville to a remote fjord in Iceland in search of peace and serenity. Their plans are horrifically altered when an ancient demon escapes from under their basement floor and Mira gives birth to an egg.

programme.title: Shocking Dark (Edited Version)
programme.desc: In a polluted future, Venice researchers work to improve the situation. One day, unknown forces start killing them. A team of soldiers and a couple of civilians is sent to investigate. Soon, they encounter strange murderous creatures.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Teens who go trick-or-treating are met with fear instead of smiles and sweets. Then, Justin brings home the wrong suitcase and is shocked to find a living man stuffed inside.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Harry stumbles upon an old scarecrow and brings it to life. Then, Lydia kills her lover and needs to hide the evidence, but after an earthquake she gets trapped inside an elevator with the body.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A killer gets stranded in a funeral home with a mortician and his monkey paw. Then, former Mayor Barkley is in prison, and with his most loyal supporters locked up too, his odds don't look good.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan discovers a cure to weight loss in a rare fat-sucking leech. Then, Rose believes she found Champ, the legendary monster of Lake Champlain, but the real monster may still be out there.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Joe's closest friends are the model toys of his favorite scary movie monsters. Then, a Public TV station is overwhelmed when the appraisal of an antique book accidentally summons a dark force.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A marketing ploy at a haunted Bed and Breakfast becomes way too realistic. Then, an exterminator gets more than he bargained for when he takes on a big job.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A misunderstanding in space ensures two astronauts go down in history for all the worst reasons. Then, Lola is convinced her brother is trying to kill her... but she's worried about the wrong monster.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A drain clog turns out to be more than just a little matted hair and soap scum. Then, scientists fight to contain the creature they've been studying - but is the true threat one of them?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Simon has invented an incredible virtual reality experience that allows him to join in on his favorite films ... but what happens when the virtual reality becomes Simon's actual reality?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Giant Jackrabbit" - Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California, like diving suits and a boat, and a television set, which Granny thinks is some kind of fancy washing machine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.desc: The young Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork with her sick brother.

programme.desc: A look at what happened to Custer and his troops at the Battle of Little Big Horn.

programme.title: The Last Posse
programme.desc: A sheriff's posse sets out after three scoundrels who've robbed a prominent rancher.

programme.title: Blackjack Ketchum, Desperado
programme.desc: A legendary gunslinger joins his fiancee in outlaw-ruled Oxhorn, hoping to live down his deadly reputation.

programme.title: Traveling Saleswoman
programme.desc: In this western comedy, the King Soap Company is doing poorly and to receive a bank loan the Banker says they must have orders. So daughter Mabel heads west as a traveling saleswoman. Just before a saloon gunfight, the loser secretely slips Mabel a paper that contains evidence that will hang three rustlers. The rustlers think she has it and are now out to get her.

programme.title: Face Of A Fugitive
programme.desc: A robber in custody, becomes wanted for murder when his brother kills a deputy sheriff to help him escape.

programme.title: The Desperadoes
programme.desc: A no-holds-barred bar room brawl, a thrilling wild horse stampede, and an exciting gunfight provide the action in DESPERADOES, a big-budget Western.

programme.title: Northwest Trail
programme.desc: Mountie Matt OBrien assignment is simple: He is to escort the rather grouchy, and slightly annoying, Miss Katherine Owens to a remote outpost. Things complicate however when they arrive at the outpost and he stumbles upon an illegal mining operation. Stars include Bob Steele, Joan Woodbury, and Poodles Hanneford.

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Roy Rogers's beloved horse Trigger is stolen and held for ransom money. Will Roy find $100,000 to get his faithful companion back, or will he find a way to trap the gang holding the horse hostage? Along with Roy and Trigger, you'll find Andy Devine as Cookie Bullfincher, and young Michael Chapin as Ted Carver, a gallant boy who helps reunite Roy with the smartest horse in show business!

programme.title: West of the Divide
programme.desc: John Wayne stars as Ted Hayden, a tough hombre who goes undercover to join a gang led by a heartless fiend known only as Mr. Gentry (Lloyd Whitlock). Gentry is out to take over a ranch belonging to one of Hayden's friends, but as Hayden finds out, Gentry has a lot more than that up his sleeve. You'll have to watch this two-fisted Western to find out the rest!

programme.title: Randy Rides Alone
programme.desc: John Wayne was 27 when he starred in this vintage western drama from Hollywoods Poverty Row. He plays Randy Bowers, a man wrongly jailed for murders. With help from a female friend, he breaks out of prison and sets out to find the real killers. Harry L. Fraser (The Last of the Clintons, Rustlers Paradise) directs a strong cast of familiar faces, including legendary sidekick George Gabby Hayes, Earl Dwyer, and one of the hardest ridin stuntmen turned actors, Yakima Canutt.

programme.title: Last of the Clintons
programme.desc: Icon of early talking pictures, Harry Carey (Red River), portrays the rugged Trigger Carson, a noble cowboy who infiltrates an outlaw gang in order to expose their rackets. Ordered to kidnap a young girl, his identity is revealed and he is forced to fight his way out of the gang and back to safety. Already 56 by the time he signed on to do this and a series of Westerns for Berke Productions, the stately Carrey (who netted an Oscar nomination four years later) was widely lauded at the time for adding a great deal of maturity and respectability due to his undeniable presence and strong performances.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: Bob's Playin' A Mystery Hand... He's Marked For Death By Killer Bullets As Gunfire Echoes Over The Plains! After one of his ranch hands is killed when a gang attacks his ranch, Jim Roberts joins forces with his neighbor in an effort to fight off the Bennett Cattle Co., a company looking to rob them of their land. Things get increasingly dangerous as the company hires Butch Crane, a professional killer, to stop them. Directed by Sam Newfield (Racing Luck (1935), Go-Get-Em, Haines (1936)), Raiders of Red Gap stars Robert Livingston (The Three Mesquiteers (1936), Larceny on the Air (1937)) as Rocky (Lone Rider) Cameron and Al St. John (Billy the Kid Trapped (1942), Border Feud (1947)) as Fuzzy Q. Jones.

programme.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Butch Cavendish gang ambushes a group of Texas Rangers, killing all but one. The surviving ranger is nursed back to health by Native American Tonto, and takes on the identity of a masked vigilante, determined to bring all outlaws to justice. Culled from episodes of the popular TV series, this feature is great fun for fans of the Lone Ranger. Starring Clayton Moore and Jay Silverheels.

programme.title: Riders of the Deadline
programme.desc: The 50th of 66 Hopalong Cassidy films finds Hoppy in a vengeful mood. When his good friend Tim Mason is unjustly sent to jail and then killed when trying to escape, Hoppys bitterness gets him drummed out of the Texas Rangers. With the help of his pals California Carson and Jimmy Rogers, he sets out to expose the real culprits and clear Tims name. The usual cast is here, including William Boyd as Hoppy, plus Andy Clyde, Jimmy Rogers, and in one of his earliest roles, Robert Mitchum.

programme.title: Doc Holliday 3
programme.desc: Doc Holliday retires to Colorado after a long battle with tuberculosis and finds himself in one final adventure to save a young man from ruthless outlaws.

programme.title: Doc Holliday
programme.desc: Doc Holliday runs a small dental practice in rural Georgia when he is visited by Wyatt Earp and offered a chance to become a United States Deputy. All Doc has to do is capture the Bridle Brothers - two of most notorious outlaws the West has ever seen. The Doc sets out on an adventure like none other to find these hardened criminals and ends up forging a friendship with Wyatt Earp that would carry into the events of Tombstone.

programme.title: Doc Holliday 2
programme.desc: After the OK Coral shootout in Tombstone, Doc Holliday opens a small Faro Saloon in a remote town where he encounters Edward Bailey. When a Faro game goes wrong for Edward, he turns up missing and Doc Holliday finds himself on trial for his murder.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: For a decade, the white settlers and the Apaches have been engaged in a bloody war with no peaceful end in sight. When a white scout, Tom Jeffords (James Stewart), has a dangerously close but enlightening encounter with the natives, he begins to see the humanity in these enemies. Entering the Apache territory seeking peace, Jeffords forms a friendship with the Apache leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), although there are people on both sides who resist extending the olive branch.

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.desc: Experience the high-octane energy of the rodeo capital of the world as Monster Jam Fast Track hits NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas. In Round 5 of the Stadium Championship Series West, the world's most elite drivers push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit across three grueling competitions: JCB Racing, the technical Skills Challenge, and the fan-favorite Freestyle. Rivalries reach a boiling point as Ryan Anderson and Tyler Menninga battle for the series points lead, while rising stars like Dalton Widner in Shell Shocked stun the crowd with gravity-defying maneuvers. From the precision of the racing brackets to the chaotic brilliance of freestyle, witness a night of shattered limits and historic performances that culminates in a surprising overall event championship for Bryce Kenny and Tech Deck Wreck Deck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon each take a third of the same chocolate sheet cake and decorate it their own way, creating three wildly different showstopping desserts in one episode. Clinton goes peanut butter, Carla goes Black Forest-inspired with sour cherry, and Michael goes coconut ganache ó proving that one bake can launch a thousand creative directions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his beloved Mini Marsala Meatballs, mixing beef and pork with breadcrumbs soaked in milk and browning them until golden before finishing them in a rich marsala-mushroom sauce. The hosts discuss proper meatball technique, family traditions around Sunday gravy, and the surprising versatility of marsala wine in savory cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon welcome Angie Rito and Scott Tacinelli, the chef-owners behind the celebrated New York restaurant Don Angie, for a lively episode dedicated to Italian American comfort food. The conversation begins with admiration for the restaurant’s iconic lasagna before shifting to the main event: a deeply flavorful, “life-changing” meatball recipe inspired by a blend of both chefs’ grandmothers’ traditions. As Angie and Scott walk through their process, they share chef-driven techniques like using a milk-soaked panade for moisture, puréed onions for even flavor distribution, and roasted garlic to avoid harsh raw bites. The hosts jump in with questions and personal anecdotes, sparking a broader discussion about Italian versus Italian American cooking, rule-breaking in the kitchen, and regional food identity—from Cleveland to New York. The group also plays a spirited round of “Discuss,” debating topics like garlic usage, cheese on seafood, and proper spaghetti etiquette, leading to humorous and opinionated exchanges. Along the way, they highlight the philosophy behind Don Angie’s food: bold, unapologetic flavors built on cheese, garlic, and tradition—without strict adherence to old-world rules. As the meatballs finish baking, they’re tossed in a simple, bright tomato sauce and served family-style, earning rave reviews from the hosts for their rich texture and layered flavor. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway of the chefs’ cookbook and a final celebration of Italian American cuisine, emphasizing creativity, collaboration, and the joy of cooking without limits.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon take on the ultimate comfort food by each creating their own version of a grilled cheese sandwich, showcasing three distinct styles that range from classic to elevated. Michael leads with a rich and decadent Croque Madame, complete with a homemade mornay sauce, gruyère, ham, and a perfectly cooked egg on top, sharing tips on building flavor and texture through technique. Carla follows with a Southern-inspired twist, hollowing out a brioche bun to stuff it with pimento cheese and tangy chow chow pickles, emphasizing balance and texture in every bite. Clinton rounds things out with a fan-inspired take on a classic grilled cheese, combining American, cheddar, and gruyère cheeses on rye bread, using mayonnaise for an evenly crisp, golden exterior. Throughout the episode, the trio trades stories, jokes, and cooking insights, debating everything from sandwich ratios to restaurant culture. They later shift into a lively “overrated vs. underrated” game, diving into food trends, brunch culture, and even aging, blending humor with candid reflections. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway and appreciation for sponsors, leaving viewers inspired to experiment with their own grilled cheese creations at home.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon welcome legendary pitmaster Melissa Cookston for a lively, flavor-packed episode centered around Mexican-inspired smoked chicken wings. The conversation kicks off with playful banter about grilling, live-fire cooking, and Melissa’s impressive barbecue credentials, setting the stage for a masterclass in flavor. Melissa walks the hosts through her approach to wings, emphasizing dry rubs over heavy sauces and showcasing a spice blend inspired by her travels to Mexico, featuring garlic, onion, smoked Hungarian paprika, ancho chili powder, cumin, and oregano. Along the way, the group dives into deeper cooking philosophy—trusting your instincts, cooking with your senses, and understanding that great barbecue is about feel as much as technique. Melissa shares insights on smoking temperatures, wood choices, and why over-smoking can ruin a dish, comparing it to over-salting. The energy stays high as Clinton hilariously spirals into wing-induced chaos, while Carla and Michael debate everything from condiments to air fryers. The episode also highlights Melissa’s new cookbook, Fanning the Flames, described as a love letter to her global culinary travels and the people who inspired her. After cooking, the group digs into the wings, followed by a round of “Chew It or Screw It” and fan mail, blending humor with heartfelt moments. The episode wraps with giveaways and a celebration of community, creativity, and the joy of cooking with fire.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his deeply satisfying Pasta e Fagioli during Bean Week, building a thick, soul-warming pasta and bean soup that he considers one of the greatest cold-weather dishes ever conceived. The hosts debate the pronunciation of Italian words in Italian-American households and celebrate the cultural heritage behind this Roman classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Valentine's Day week launches with Carla Hall making an Easy Chicken Curry that she considers the perfect romantic dinner: warming, aromatic, and impressive without being stressful. The hosts debate whether cooking for a date should feel effortless or theatrical and share their own most romantic food memories.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "McDonald's General Tso's Chicken" - Chris Ying has seen all of the McDonald's "hacks" that are floating around social media, and he's calling BS. Most of these don't even qualify as actual hacks, so he takes matters into his own hands and concocts a clever dish using Chicken McNuggets, Sweet & Sour sauce, ketchup, (and a few other things you'd have in your kitchen) to truly upgrade your McDonald's meal.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "SPOOOOKY Halloween Treats!" - Chris cracks into his wife's Pinterest account to see what sort of Halloween recipes she's interested in, and is horrified by what he finds: Crescent Roll Mummy Dogs and Cheesy Halloween Breadstick Bones. We decided to throw in Witch Finger Pretzels to BOO-t. (sigh) These may not be the most culinarily advanced recipes you'll see Chris experiment with, but they are genuinely fun holiday treats that would be fun to do with your little monsters.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Silky Spicy Eggplant" - Chris is joined by beloved cookbook author Hetty McKinnon to test out “EASY & QUICK VEGAN EGGLANT RECIPE IN CHINA” from TikTok/IG sensation @foodiechina888 (a.k.a. Wayne Shen).

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Pork and Chive Dumplings with Chris Ying" - Chris Ying has made a lot of dumplings in his day. In fact, he always keeps a batch in the freezer for whenever the kids need a quick dinner. Today, he shares his go-to pork dumpling recipe, including two quick sauces.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Chris Ying Makes His Signature "Pickled" Green Beans with Ground Pork" - The most popular recipe in the history of the Recipe Club podcast, Chris Ying's "Pickled" Green Beans with Ground Pork are a perfect accompaniment to rice. Salty, sour, packed with umami, and a little bit spicy, they beat the pants off Aunt Clarissa's green-bean casserole. For the spice-heads, Chris adds a hit of chopped, pickled jalapeño at the last minute for a little kick.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang Shares 3 Quick and Easy Recipes: Meatballs, Braised Chicken and 'Hugo' Pasta" - Dave cooks up three of his easiest, go-to recipes that are all endlessly riffable, can be prepped ahead and frozen, and make good use of some clever microwave techniques. Pork meatballs over pasta, braised chicken, and "Hugo" pastaâ€”a delicious twist on pesto pasta that kids love.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "A THANKSGIVING MIRACLE! David Chang and Friends Make a FULL Thanksgiving Dinner in 2 hours?!?!" - David Chang is joined by Chris Ying and Chris Bianco while they attempt to make an entire Thanksgiving dinner in less than 2 hours...no cuts, no tricks. Just people cooking, cussin', starting things on fire, and having a (mostly) nice time. Hey, it's the holidays...we're all miserable.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang Makes an Epic Thanksgiving Leftover Sandwich" - Dave has joined forces with Amazon Prime Thursday Night Football to create a new tradition for their first-ever Black Friday Football game on November 24—make a ridiculous sandwich for the game MVP using Thanksgiving leftovers. This is Dave's first attempt, so there are plenty of learnings discovered along the way as he tries to construct a worthy sandwich...making an entire Thanksgiving spread along the way. Get ready to unhinge your jaw, because this sandwich is something straight out of Shaggy and Scoob's playbook.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang recreates his mom's holiday specialty (bindaetteok 빈대떡)" - David Chang recreates his mom's holiday specialty (bindaetteok 빈대떡) - When Dave Chang was growing up, his mom always made mung-bean pancakes with kimchi, scallion, and pork belly for any celebratory dinner. So, as Dave gears up for the holidays, he's trying to channel her culinary energy into his own version of Korean bindaetteok. Try as he might, he just can't get it to taste exactly the same, but isn't that what makes moms special?

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Chicken Pot Pie from scratch in 45 minutes?! REAL-TIME COOKING" - After a long day of filming in the studio kitchen, Dave Chang wanted one more challenge. For no reason other than to see if he could do it, he attempted the utterly ridiculous task of making chicken pot pie, completely from scratch, in under 45 minutes. This is no BS! Dave enlists his buddy, Chris Ying, to help. The guys have nothing prepped, no plan, and no recipes. Dave’s gonna tackle the crust. Chris is gonna make the filling. The timer starts, and they’re off. WILL THEY MAKE IT HAPPEN?

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang upgrades his Momofuku Sweet & Spicy Noodles (with a perfect fried egg!)" - Dave cooks up some of the Momofuku Sweet & Spicy Noodles and tricks them out with Korean dongchimi (pickled radish), kimchi and a—ahem—*perfectly* fried egg.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Sunday Gravy All Week: We don't need to tell you that kids like spaghetti and meatballs. Who doesn't? And Sunday gravy—with its chunks of fatty meat and sausage bobbing around in red sauce with the meatballs—is even better. Now, the real prize is what else you can do with that gravy. It's not just for lasagna and eggplant parm. Chris Ying shows you his Sunday Gravy recipe, and then how to take that same punchy, meaty, tomato-based umami sauce and use it to make beefy bean and cheese burritos and ratatouille.

programme.title: Wild Life

programme.title: National Parks Revealed

programme.title: Under the Pole

programme.title: Green Tourism

programme.title: The New Environmentalists
programme.desc: Fresh water is one of Earth's sacred resources. Lake Turkana's freshwater resources are vital to countless people who rely on it for sustenance. When a dam threatened to disturb the Lake's ecosystem, some took action to protect their home.

programme.title: The New Environmentalists
programme.desc: A healthy mind, body, and environment are all critical for living happy and productive lives. Meet pioneering people in Iraq, Colombia, South Africa, Indonesia, the United States, and Italy who believe in living symbiotically with nature.

programme.title: Wild Life
programme.desc: A long, mountainous, fascinating passage connects North and South America. Here, hundreds of thousands of species live in one of the richest and most diverse places on earth the Caribbean rainforests.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Portland, OR a man in custody accuses officers of being involved in the 1992 event at Ruby Ridge. In Las Vegas, LV a daring inmate attempts to make a break for it while the supervising officers attend to a disturbance.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An arrested man is caught on camera making a run for freedom. An addict returns to jail and tells officers that meth is controlling his mind. Humility may be the key for one man to quit his life of crime. A shoplifter calls 9-1-1 to help him get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an upset inmate damages the door on a patrol car. In Portland, OR a man over-estimates the legal consequences of his actions. In Tacoma, WA a couple charged with domestic violence denies getting physical even though there’s blood in the woman’s hair.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman stalking David Copperfield is arrested. An inebriated inmate voices her displeasure with the guards, and a man nabbed for driving under the influence of prescription drugs howls for his dog.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A prisoner refuses to exit his cell prompting an elaborate extraction. A man begins singing in response to his arrest. During a severe alcohol withdrawal, an inmate repeatedly escapes his restraints.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Deputies assist arresting officers by removing an angry man from their patrol car. Violent outbursts plague an arrest. One woman struggles with bail. Three drunk men become wildly emotional.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman who says she’s called “Sunshine” has less than a sunny disposition. A man ditches a halfway house for jail to get his life in order. A career criminal shows no regret for his “thug life.” Tense moments in Booking as officers and medical staff try to save a young man from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is placed into a restraint chair during intake. Punches are thrown and questions are asked after a fight occurs. After dodging a bar tab, a woman is also accused of spiting and biting.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man arrested for domestic violence threatens to put all the officers in jail. Inmates on kitchen duty get into a fist fight over a dish towel. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A young father pulls a desperate double robbery to make ends meet. A routine shakedown gets deadly when officers uncover alarming contraband. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Two agitated inmates are put in restraints to cool down. A suspected burglar expresses concern over a milk allergy, and an inmate becomes upset about the care given to her belongings.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic Collection 2
programme.desc: Join Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic, as he repairs a whole new bunch of vehicles for even more animal friends!

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: I Like To Ride My Bicycle (Mr. Monkey) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Let's go on a bike ride with Mr. Monkey and friends as we sing along to this Mr. Monkey version of the original Super Simple Song, "I Like To Ride My Bicycle." This is a great song to introduce during transportation themes! I like to ride my bicycle. I ride it every day. I ride it when I go to school. Or when I want to play.

programme.title: What's Your Name? - Kids Song - Finny the Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny the Shark is saying "Hello" and asking the question "What's your name?" This is a fun song to start the day at preschool! Hello, hello. What’s your name? Hello, hello. What’s your name? My name is Finny! My name is Myrtle! Nice to meet you.

programme.title: Wind The Bobbin Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Wind the bobbin up. Wind the bobbin up. Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.” Get up and dance with this super fun version of the traditional English nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Riley is in Singapore visiting his friend Lifen who is a local movie star. Golden Boy is a huge fan of Lifen's and wants to be in the movie with her.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Maggie wants to be a buddy-cop-duo with her pet Chihuahua, Kiki, and help people in need. So, Jett delivers police costumes and joins them in patrolling the town. Jett flies to Hamburg to deliver a pair of mini vacuum cleaners to help Lars and his Dad clean up a spillage of popcorn across their impressive model village. They have trouble reaching popcorn inside the village's train tunnel.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Peiru and her dad are hiking the Great Wall of China in Beijing. Heavy snowfall has made the Great Wall difficult to traverse, so Peiru orders winter hiking gear. Dale wants to be in an underwater bike race with his dad, and help him win. So Jett delivers a tandem bicycle and agrees to join their team. Things take a turn when Golden Boy enters the race and sends them off-course.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A toddler in South Korea named Ha-Jun has a cold but doesn't like the taste of the medicine that his Dad needs to give him. Ha-Jun's sister Yuna calls the Super Wings for help. A boy named Geir in Iceland goes with his Mom on a tour to see arctic foxes in their natural habitat. Geir orders an arctic fox costume to wear so the shy foxes will come out of their caves and meet him.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a huge inflatable sword to Neele, an accessory for the balloon version of the legendary dragon-fighter Siegfried she is flying with her Papa in the annual balloon festival. Fabio loves soccer but he is not interested in history. At the San Augustin Archeological Park, he accidentally drops his ball into one of the sites with many ancient statues! Jett delivers him a stretchy claw.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Alani notices that the sea level is rising around the island of Tuvalu she orders a huge lifeboat for all the people in her village to ride on. Jett finds himself stuck in ice in Antarctica courtesy of Golden Boy, Golden Wheels, and a giant Golden Robot. He is rescued by World Aircraft and learns that Golden Boy has caused lots of global warming problems around the planet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A passenger airplane bound for Italy has to make an emergency landing on World Aircraft. When Lime offers to prepare a meal for the passengers, Mano, a young boy passenger, makes a popular suggestion: pizza! Ratu and his Dad are excited about a "survival challenge" on one of Fiji's Desert Islands, but they forgot to bring their survival guide to teach them how to filter water!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers flowery mooncakes to Meilin, a young girl who wants to celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival by leaving a gift for the Moon Lady, who is said to descend from the moon according to Chinese folklore. A girl named Emma lives in Transinne, Belgium and she asks the Super Wings if they can help her with her solar system school project.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Astra and Rover continue to help Emma, her Dad, and spaceship Rick see the solar system. Trouble is Golden Boy and Golden Wheels tag along! Jett delivers a claw grabber to Marcia, a little girl playing a treasure hunt game in which she searches for hidden treasure notes in the Rio Abiseo National Park in Peru. Our Super Wing helps her in her search!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter three pandas on a country road in Chengdu, China. They try to help get the pandas off the highway and back to the panda centre. A girl asks the Super Wings for help in locating a dolphin in the waters off Iceland. Jett and Paul deliver a sonar device that can track dolphin whistles.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a princess's dogs need to attend training school she worries that they're too playful to pass. Jett and Donnie deliver some special training suits to help them succeed. When the Super Pets accidentally knock down a birthday piñata at a house outside of Mexico City, Jett and Jerome deliver a huge piñata replacement for the boy's party.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets visit Pisa, Italy where some street cats have made a mess spilling recycling bins. Jett and a new Super Wing called Shine deliver tongs and help with the clean up. The Super Pets are in Pohang, South Korea where they meet a girl whose robot is in need of repairs. Jett and Jerome deliver a much needed repair kit and some robot dance lessons!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets meet a boy in the Serengeti National Park whose ball rolls into an ostrich nest. The mother ostrich thinks the ball is one of her eggs and won't give it back. When a hippo gets stuck on a waterslide at a community swimming pool in Kenya, a boy calls on the Super Wings to deliver a hippo-sized life ring to help free it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers winter clothes to a little girl living in Egypt's Sahara Desert where a cold snap has left the desert snowy. Jett and Astra show her how to enjoy the snow. After the Super Pets accidentally knock down some Turkish rugs in an Istanbul market, Jett and Ellie deliver a magic lamp that can summon two genies.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy, Kima, and his Dad are trekking through the Himalaya mountains in Nepal. The Super Wings bring an LED torch to help them. Trouble strikes when a baby yeti startles them. Vo, the Mars rover, is celebrating his birthday but misses his friend Catalina. Jett and Astra come to the rescue and promise to bring Catalina and her ginormous gift to Mars.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: For Children's Day, Wang Min's Dad has invited his son and his classmates to visit his toy factory. While cleaning up before the visit, a robot toy goes on a rampage. The Super Pets encounter an itchy lion at a sanctuary in South Africa. Jett and Astra deliver a back scratcher, but the lion's itchiness is stronger than they realized!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets go into a video game arcade and play a video game called Dessert Kingdom. They are watched by a boy named Yoonho and they decide to go into the game itself. When the Super Pets unearth a woolly mammoth, a Nenets boy wants to keep it. The mammoth must be able to pull a sleigh so Jett and Dizzy deliver a mammoth size sleigh.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus Nursery Rhymes For Children - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Wheels on the bus is a nursery rhymes that little babies love! Come join Little Treehouse as they sing, dance in this fun kids educational video with our version of the classic wheels on the bus called the wheels on the bus and many more preschool rhymes for babies like rain rain go away, row row your boat, head shoulder knees and toes and many more

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical and of the Little Treehouse! where you are take non magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like I spy song, to market to market, animals sounds song, mary had a little lamb, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Wheels On The Garbage Truck + More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Hey Kids, Little Treehouse is back with more nursery rhymes for toddlers that you will enjoy. Wheels on the Garbage Truck is here to take you on a fun ride where we sing-along, dance and have fun.Come join in this preschool adventure and enjoy it with your friends. Little Treehouse has some amazing animated learning videos and more baby rhymes collection like,Who Stole My Toy, Happy Elephant, Chew Your Food, Doctor Checkup Song, Swimming Song, Peek A Boo, Rock a Bye Baby and many more Kindergarten Songs.

programme.title: Farmees Movie Compilation
programme.desc: Farmees brings you the best of nursery rhymes and kids songs. Your kids are sure to enjoy!

programme.title: Dinobees Funny Cartoon Show for Kids
programme.desc: Welcome to #Dinobees, a funny show for kids. It revolves around a family that discovers and adopts three dinosaurs. This comedy cartoon is perfect entertainment for toddlers.Dinobees has some amazing 3d animations. Get ready to have great jungle adventures with cartoon animals and dinosaurs.This entertaining playlist is a collection of videos for children like Fire Discovery, Fruits of Labour, Magical Berries, Catch me If You can, Glue Trap, Mis Splits, I Wanna Fly, The Gophers, Baby Sitter, Frozen Lake, Bubble Trouble, Where's My Water and many more videos.

programme.title: Super Supremes Dinosaur Song & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: The kids are so excited to learn about dinosaurs. Here is a collection of our best videos.

programme.title: Super Car Royce - Back To Back
programme.desc: Watch this compilation from Super Car Royce Back To School!

programme.desc: When Sonic vanishes mysteriously, Tails enlists the help of a bi-plane pilot named William Le' Duc, and Professor Von Schlemmer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Lazy con-man Bo Beagle has the Choas Emerald ring stuck on his finger, and Robotnik wants it for one of his evil schemes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Throbbin Screech brings a TV crew to interview Robotnik for "Lifestyles of the Sick and Twisted". Robotnik rampages through the Mobius countryside proving how sick and twisted he is, and Sonic is kept busy doing rescues. Tails decides to take on...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma Robotnik forces her son to run for President of Mobius with Wes Weasley as his campaign manager.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a flute-playing Ninja crane, taps his martial arts knowledge, and transfers it to Scratch and Grounder.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Scratch and Grounder fiddle with Robotnik's Warpinating Warpifier and send Sonic and Tails into the world of a Mobius Fairy Tales book.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a "rites of passage" stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trance-like visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: How did Dublin get its name? And what do Vikings and a black pool have to do with it? Who was Maewyn Succat, and why is he celebrated with green beer? How did the harp become a symbol of Ireland, and why do the harps on Irish coins and Guinness beer look different? What is the curious history of the Book of Kells, and how did it make its way into Trinity Colleges Longroom Library?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Who were the Habsburgs, Maria Theresa, Franz Joseph and Sisi? And how did they shape Vienna? What is the Ringstrasse, and why are there so many oversized, ornate public buildings dotting it? Where did Mozart perform as a 6-year-old prodigy? When and why did Austria shrink to a tenth of its size? What do the eagles on the rooftop of St. Stephens Cathedral symbolize? And why are Viennas coffee and pastries so legendary?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: This beautiful region of England is full of picture-perfect rolling hills, quaint stone cottages, sprawling country estates and that distinct Yorkshire dialect. Why are country estates named Castles and Abbeys? What is The Shambles, and how did it get its name? Why is one of the largest medieval Gothic cathedrals in Europe in the small town of York? How did the Quakers and chocolate shape Yorks history? Where and what is Herriots country?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Why is there a giant church complex, the DomQuartier, in this tiny Alpine town? And why is there an equally giant medieval fortress high above it? Who lived in Mirabell Palace? And Hellbrun Palace? Why is Getreidegassse so charming, and why are those shop signs so important? And how do you solve a problem like Maria? From the Sound of Music to Silent Night to the Sonatas of this towns beloved Mozart, its time to get curious about Salzburg.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: How did this UNESCO town in Mexico get such a curious name? And what do a duck and a dog have to do with it? Why are there so many grand mansions in such a small town? Why do postcards have to do with its soaring Gothic church? Why is there an art school in a former convent? And how did San Miguel de Allende become a magnet for retired American military on the G.I. Bill?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Why did the Scottish kings live in Edinburgh, and why dont we have Scottish kings anymore? Why was Edinburgh Castle built high upon on Castle Rock? Whats the connection between Edinburgh and Harry Potter? And where are the real-life inspirations for Harry Potter locations? What is so royal about Edinburghs Royal Mile? Who is Arthur, and why does he get his own Seat?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Why is there a stone giant holding a flame, high in the hills overlooking the town? How did silver help shape this Mexican town? Why are its streets and alleys so winding, and what happened to the Guanajuato River? What does the towns main church have to do with the King of Spain? Why does the towns marketplace look like a Paris train station? And its theatre look like the Paris Opera House?

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 1968, one of the largest audiences in television history tuned in to an extraordinary sight: a live telecast of the moon's surface as seen from Apollo 8, the first manned space flight to leave Earth's gravitational pull and orbit the moon. The historic journey captivated people around the world.As this documentary reveals, however, the mission's success was far from assured. The Apollo 8 astronauts had just four months to prepare for the risky lunar orbit, and catastrophic failure would have brought a halt to America's goal of putting a man on the moon before the end of the decade.This film recounts the flight many consider to be NASA's most daring and important. Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists take viewers inside the high-stakes space race of the late 1960s to reveal how a bold decision by NASA administrators put a struggling Apollo program back on track and allowed America to reach the moon before the Soviets.

programme.title: Women Outward Bound
programme.desc: A young girl today might have a hard time believing there was a time when girls were not supposed to do what boys were doing. To them, it's normal to compete in sports, be strong, and get gritty while enjoying the outdoors. But that wasn't the case in the 1960s, when girls were expected to be delicate, clean and demure, while aspiring to secure a husband and keep house.Yet in 1965, these stereotypes didnt stop 24 adventurous young women from setting out to paddle canoes into the wilderness and live in the woods of Minnesota without any food or shelter, and who in the process, broke barriers.WOMEN OUTWARD BOUND profiles the first group of young women to participate in the rigorous U.S. Outward Bound wilderness school in 1965 and chronicles their experiences in the wild. It also captures how one month in the woods taught them they could do more than they ever thought possible. During their experience, the young women forged a special bond, and at a reunion 47 years later, the group reminisce about the lessons they learned and the memories they made, with some surprising revelations. They didnt realize it at the time, but they were a part of changing the course of history.The documentary takes the viewer on a journey over many decades with rare archival footage, personal diary entries, family home videos, photos and aerial footage of the challenging Boundary Waters Canoe Area Wilderness. In the end, the girls proved that they could always handle the difficult challenges given by naturethey just needed to be given the chance.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Why is a European Christmas Market also called Weihnachtsmarkt or a Christkindlmarkt? And what do these markets have to do with the Holy Roman Empire? Why do you find Christmas Markets mostly in German-speaking countries? What is the curious history of the Advent Wreath, of Silent Night, and a creepy Christmas character named Krampus? And is a Krampus different than a Krapfen?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: You may not be able to live like a royal, but wouldnt it be nice to shop like one? In this episode, we explore the curious world of Royal Warrants, a special designation given to only the best shops and services, literally fit for a king (or queen, or prince or princess). Kind of like knighthood for a shop. From the royal dressmakers to tiara makers to the royal cheesemonger (yes, there is such a thing), we take you across London, inside the world of the royals.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Who is buried under Glasgow Cathedral and why? Who is Saint Mungo, and why is he so big? Why does Glasgow City Chambers look like a palace? How did this seaport town become a center for Scottish Enlightenment? And how did the creativity of one man, Charles Rennie Mackintosh, leave a permanent mark on this city?
